headline: Textron (TXT) Valuation Check As SkyCourier Lands First Defense Win And New Special Mission Upgrade
summary: Textron (TXT) is in focus after Textron Aviation said Belgium selected the Cessna SkyCourier as a new special mission aircraft, while also introducing an In-Flight Operable Door option aimed at specialized operations. See our latest analysis for Textron. The latest SkyCourier defense contracts and special mission upgrades arrive after Textron’s share price return softened in recent weeks, with a 30 day share price return decline of 7.67% but a 1 year total shareholder return of 44.04% still...
